rows.src_en: Get timeline tweets from a list. Each page returns up to 20 tweets. Use cursor for pagination.
rows.desc_en: Fetch the reverse-chronological tweets posted by members of a given Twitter list, one page at a time. Pass the cursor returned by the previous call to walk through older tweets.
rows.title_zh: 按时间倒序获取某个 Twitter 列表内成员发布的推文，每次返回一页。把上一次返回的游标传入即可继续翻看更早的推文。

rows.src_en: The list ID to get tweets from. e.g. 1846987139428634858
rows.desc_en: Identifier of the Twitter list whose member tweets you want to read.
rows.title_zh: 要读取其成员推文的 Twitter 列表标识。

rows.src_en: Cursor for paginating through results. Leave empty for the first page.
rows.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
rows.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

rows.src_en: Array of tweets from the list
rows.desc_en: Tweets returned for this page of the list timeline.
rows.title_zh: 本页列表时间线返回的推文集合。

rows.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.
rows.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为推文。

rows.desc_en: Unique identifier of the tweet.
rows.title_zh: 推文的唯一标识。

rows.desc_en: Web link to the tweet on X/Twitter.
rows.title_zh: 推文在 X/Twitter 上的网页链接。

rows.desc_en: Full text content of the tweet.
rows.title_zh: 推文的完整正文内容。

rows.src_en: The source client of the tweet
rows.desc_en: Name of the client application used to post the tweet, such as the web or a mobile app.
rows.title_zh: 发布该推文所用的客户端应用名称，如网页或某款手机应用。

rows.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted.
rows.title_zh: 推文被转发的次数。

rows.desc_en: Number of replies to the tweet.
rows.title_zh: 推文收到的回复数。

rows.desc_en: Number of likes on the tweet.
rows.title_zh: 推文获得的点赞数。

rows.desc_en: Number of quote tweets referencing this tweet.
rows.title_zh: 引用该推文的引用推文数。

rows.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been viewed.
rows.title_zh: 推文的浏览次数。

rows.src_en: The date and time the tweet was created
rows.desc_en: Timestamp when the tweet was created.
rows.title_zh: 推文的创建时间。

rows.desc_en: Detected language of the tweet text, as a language code.
rows.title_zh: 推文正文被识别出的语言，以语言代码表示。

rows.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been bookmarked.
rows.title_zh: 推文被收藏的次数。

rows.desc_en: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.
rows.title_zh: 该推文是否为对另一条推文的回复。

rows.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet this one directly replies to; present only when isReply is true.
rows.title_zh: 该推文直接回复的目标推文标识；仅当 isReply 为真时存在。

rows.desc_en: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.
rows.title_zh: 该推文所属对话线程的起始推文标识。

rows.desc_en: Identifier of the user being replied to.
rows.title_zh: 被回复用户的标识。

rows.desc_en: Username of the user being replied to.
rows.title_zh: 被回复用户的用户名。

rows.desc_en: Profile of the user who posted the tweet.
rows.title_zh: 发布该推文的用户资料。

rows.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
rows.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

rows.desc_en: The user's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
rows.title_zh: 用户的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

rows.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile page.
rows.title_zh: 用户资料页的网页链接。

rows.desc_en: Unique identifier of the user.
rows.title_zh: 用户的唯一标识。

rows.desc_en: The user's display name shown on the profile.
rows.title_zh: 用户在资料页展示的昵称。

rows.src_en: Indicates if the user is blue verified
rows.desc_en: Whether the user holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
rows.title_zh: 用户是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

rows.desc_en: The user's verification category, such as a business or government account.
rows.title_zh: 用户的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

rows.desc_en: Web link to the user's avatar image.
rows.title_zh: 用户头像图片的网页链接。

rows.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile banner image.
rows.title_zh: 用户资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

rows.desc_en: The user's profile bio text.
rows.title_zh: 用户资料页的个人简介文字。

rows.desc_en: Free-text location the user lists on their profile.
rows.title_zh: 用户在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

rows.desc_en: Number of accounts following the user.
rows.title_zh: 关注该用户的账号数。

rows.desc_en: Number of accounts the user follows.
rows.title_zh: 该用户关注的账号数。

rows.src_en: Indicates if the user can be direct messaged
rows.desc_en: Whether the user currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
rows.title_zh: 该用户当前是否接受请求方的私信。

rows.desc_en: Timestamp when the user's account was created.
rows.title_zh: 该用户账号的创建时间。

rows.desc_en: Number of tweets the user has liked.
rows.title_zh: 该用户点赞过的推文数。

rows.src_en: Indicates if the user has custom timelines
rows.desc_en: Whether the user has created custom timelines.
rows.title_zh: 该用户是否创建过自定义时间线。

rows.src_en: Indicates if the user is a translator
rows.desc_en: Whether the user participates in the Twitter translation program.
rows.title_zh: 该用户是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

rows.desc_en: Number of media items the user has posted.
rows.title_zh: 该用户发布过的媒体条目数。

rows.desc_en: Total number of tweets the user has posted.
rows.title_zh: 该用户发布过的推文总数。

rows.src_en: List of countries where the user is withheld
rows.desc_en: Country codes where the user's account is withheld for legal reasons.
rows.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽该用户账号的国家／地区代码列表。

rows.src_en: Indicates if the user has sensitive content
rows.desc_en: Whether the user's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
rows.title_zh: 该用户的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

rows.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the user has pinned to the top of their profile.
rows.title_zh: 该用户置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

rows.src_en: Indicates if the account is automated
rows.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
rows.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

rows.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
rows.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

rows.src_en: Indicates if the account is unavailable
rows.desc_en: Whether the user's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
rows.title_zh: 该用户账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

rows.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
rows.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

rows.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
rows.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

rows.desc_en: Structured profile bio, including the raw description text and the entities parsed out of it.
rows.title_zh: 结构化的资料简介，包含简介原文及从中解析出的实体。

rows.desc_en: Raw bio text exactly as shown on the profile.
rows.title_zh: 资料页展示的简介原文。

rows.desc_en: Entities parsed from the bio, grouping links found in the description text and in the profile's website field.
rows.title_zh: 从简介中解析出的实体，分别归类简介正文中的链接与资料网址字段中的链接。

rows.desc_en: Links detected within the bio description text.
rows.title_zh: 在简介正文中检测到的链接。

rows.desc_en: List of links found in the bio description.
rows.title_zh: 简介正文中找到的链接列表。

rows.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the website link as displayed.
rows.title_zh: 显示的网址链接的短化、易读形式。

rows.desc_en: Full destination URL the website link resolves to.
rows.title_zh: 网址链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

rows.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the website field.
rows.title_zh: 该链接在网址字段中的起止字符位置。

rows.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the website field.
rows.title_zh: 网址字段中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

rows.desc_en: Links detected in the profile's dedicated website field.
rows.title_zh: 在资料页专门的网址字段中检测到的链接。

rows.desc_en: List of links found in the profile website field.
rows.title_zh: 资料网址字段中找到的链接列表。

rows.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the website link as displayed.
rows.title_zh: 显示的网址链接的短化、易读形式。

rows.desc_en: Full destination URL the website link resolves to.
rows.title_zh: 网址链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

rows.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the website field.
rows.title_zh: 该链接在网址字段中的起止字符位置。

rows.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the website field.
rows.title_zh: 网址字段中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

rows.src_en: Indicates if there are more results available
rows.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
rows.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

rows.src_en: Cursor for fetching the next page of results
rows.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
rows.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

rows.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when the timeline was returned, error otherwise.
rows.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回时间线为 success，否则为 error。

rows.src_en: Message of the request, error message if status is error
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
rows.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

rows.src_en: Get followers of a list. Page size is 20.
rows.desc_en: List the users who follow a given Twitter list, one page at a time, paginating with the cursor from the previous response.
rows.title_zh: 分页获取关注某个 Twitter 列表的用户，使用上一次响应返回的游标继续翻页。

rows.desc_en: Identifier of the Twitter list whose followers you want to read.
rows.title_zh: 要读取其关注者的 Twitter 列表标识。

rows.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
rows.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

rows.desc_en: Users following the list, returned for this page.
rows.title_zh: 本页返回的关注该列表的用户。

rows.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
rows.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

rows.desc_en: The user's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
rows.title_zh: 用户的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

rows.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile page.
rows.title_zh: 用户资料页的网页链接。

rows.desc_en: Unique identifier of the user.
rows.title_zh: 用户的唯一标识。

rows.desc_en: The user's display name shown on the profile.
rows.title_zh: 用户在资料页展示的昵称。

rows.desc_en: The user's verification category, such as a business or government account.

rows.desc_en: Web link to the user's avatar image.
rows.title_zh: 用户头像图片的网页链接。

rows.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile banner image.
rows.title_zh: 用户资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

rows.desc_en: The user's profile bio text.
rows.title_zh: 用户资料页的个人简介文字。

rows.desc_en: Free-text location the user lists on their profile.
rows.title_zh: 用户在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

rows.desc_en: Number of accounts following the user.
rows.title_zh: 关注该用户的账号数。

rows.desc_en: Number of accounts the user follows.
rows.title_zh: 该用户关注的账号数。

rows.src_en: Indicates if the user can be direct messaged
rows.desc_en: Whether the user currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
rows.title_zh: 该用户当前是否接受请求方的私信。

rows.desc_en: Timestamp when the user's account was created.
rows.title_zh: 该用户账号的创建时间。

rows.desc_en: Number of tweets the user has liked.
rows.title_zh: 该用户点赞过的推文数。

rows.src_en: Indicates if the user has custom timelines
rows.desc_en: Whether the user has created custom timelines.
rows.title_zh: 该用户是否创建过自定义时间线。

rows.src_en: Indicates if the user is a translator
rows.desc_en: Whether the user participates in the Twitter translation program.

rows.desc_en: Number of media items the user has posted.

rows.desc_en: Total number of tweets the user has posted.

rows.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.

rows.src_en: Indicates if there are more results available

rows.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

rows.src_en: Cursor for fetching the next page of results
rows.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
rows.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

rows.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when followers were returned, error otherwise.
rows.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回关注者为 success，否则为 error。

rows.src_en: Message of the request, error message if status is error
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
rows.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

rows.src_en: Get members of a list. Page size is 20.
rows.desc_en: List the users who are members of a given Twitter list, one page at a time, paginating with the cursor from the previous response.
rows.title_zh: 分页获取某个 Twitter 列表的成员用户，使用上一次响应返回的游标继续翻页。

rows.desc_en: Identifier of the Twitter list whose members you want to read.
rows.title_zh: 要读取其成员的 Twitter 列表标识。

rows.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
rows.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

rows.desc_en: Member users of the list, returned for this page.
rows.title_zh: 本页返回的列表成员用户。

rows.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
rows.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

rows.title_zh: 该用户的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

rows.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the user has pinned to the top of their profile.
rows.title_zh: 该用户置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

rows.src_en: Indicates if the account is automated
rows.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
rows.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

rows.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
rows.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

rows.src_en: Indicates if the account is unavailable
rows.desc_en: Whether the user's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
rows.title_zh: 该用户账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

rows.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
rows.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

rows.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
rows.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

rows.desc_en: Structured profile bio, including the raw description text and the entities parsed out of it.
rows.title_zh: 结构化的资料简介，包含简介原文及从中解析出的实体。

rows.desc_en: Raw bio text exactly as shown on the profile.
rows.title_zh: 资料页展示的简介原文。

rows.desc_en: Entities parsed from the bio, grouping links found in the description text and in the profile's website field.
rows.title_zh: 从简介中解析出的实体，分别归类简介正文中的链接与资料网址字段中的链接。

rows.desc_en: Links detected within the bio description text.
rows.title_zh: 在简介正文中检测到的链接。

rows.desc_en: List of links found in the bio description.
rows.title_zh: 简介正文中找到的链接列表。

rows.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the website link as displayed.
rows.title_zh: 显示的网址链接的短化、易读形式。

rows.desc_en: Full destination URL the website link resolves to.
rows.title_zh: 网址链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

rows.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the website field.
rows.title_zh: 该链接在网址字段中的起止字符位置。

rows.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the website field.
rows.title_zh: 网址字段中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

rows.desc_en: Links detected in the profile's dedicated website field.
rows.title_zh: 在资料页专门的网址字段中检测到的链接。

rows.desc_en: List of links found in the profile website field.
rows.title_zh: 资料网址字段中找到的链接列表。

rows.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the website link as displayed.
rows.title_zh: 显示的网址链接的短化、易读形式。

rows.desc_en: Full destination URL the website link resolves to.
rows.title_zh: 网址链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

rows.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the website field.
rows.title_zh: 该链接在网址字段中的起止字符位置。

rows.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the website field.
rows.title_zh: 网址字段中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

rows.src_en: Indicates if there are more results available
rows.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
rows.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

rows.src_en: Cursor for fetching the next page of results
rows.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
rows.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

rows.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when members were returned, error otherwise.
rows.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回成员为 success，否则为 error。

rows.src_en: Message of the request, error message if status is error
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
rows.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。
